description_text: Bandai RE: Super Change Series — Cobrander (B-Robo Kabutack) Relive the classic peak of metal-hero comedy Tokusatsu completely re-engineered for modern collectors. Bandai officially introduces the RE: Super Change Cobrander articulated figure from the beloved Tokusatsu masterpiece B-Robo Kabutack . This definitive release thoroughly updates the historic vintage transformation gimmick with state-of-the-art structural materials, vibrant paint enhancements, and highly expanded posing mechanics. The central milestone of this figure is its flawless, full-body "Super Change" transformation system . Shifting dynamically from his round, snake-headed Normal Mode into his tall, agile Super Mode warrior stance, this figure brings all the original on-screen excitement straight to your palm. Standing at a handy height of approximately 160mm (16cm), it perfectly balances premium cabinet display presence with satisfying tactile play value. Bandai's engineering team has completely overhauled the classic mechanical blueprint to maximize articulation. The range of motion across his neck, chest, waist, legs, and ankles has been drastically increased, allowing collectors to execute fluid combat stance
